DECLARATION OF DANIEL HATTIS IN SUPPORT OF UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT (AMENDED) (TRANSACTION ID # 100070544) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDREWS, CARMEN ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED MUNNING, LAURIE COLADONATO, CARON PALLAGROSI, MICHAEL ON BEHALF OF THEMSELVES AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CARMEN ANDREWS, LAURIE MUNNING, CARON COLADONATO, MICHAEL PALLAGROSI'S UNOPPOSED MOTION AND MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. HEARING IS HELD. THE COURT HAVING REVIEWED THE PLEADINGS AND HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT RULES AS FOLLOWS: THE MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL IS GRANTED. HEARING FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS TO BE SET FOR AUGUST 23, 2019 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 302. Compliance Hearing Re: Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Continued To Apr-23-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Stephen DeNittis, Esq. of DENITTIS OSEFCHEN PRINCE PC, T:8563.797.9951, for plaintiff, on Court Call;
Paul Lucacs, Esq. of HATTIS LAW, T:650.980.1990, for plaintiff, on Court Call;
Joseph Duffy, Esq. of MORGAN LEWIS BOCKIUS LLP, T:213.612.7378, for defendant, by Court Call.

Hearing was held on Compliance Re: Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement. The Court was updated as to the progress of the Claims Administrator re: processing of the claims. Plaintiff's counsel projects that the certificates should be sent out by the end of March 2020. Therefore, to the satisfaction of the Court and per agreement of parties,

a Final Compliance Hearing re: Final Approval of Class Action Settlement is set for April 23, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302. Plaintiff's counsel shall file a memorandum; parties may appear by court call.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Stephen DeNittis, Esq. of DeNittis Osefchen Prince PC, T:8563.797.9951, for plaintiff/moving party;
Daniel Hattis, Esq. of Hattis Law, T:650.980.1990, for plaintiff/moving party;
Janille Chambers, Esq. of Morgan Lewis Bockius LLP, T:213.612.7378, for defendant, by Court Call.

RULING: The tentative ruling was not contested, and adopted by the Court, as follows:

PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR FINAL APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

A compliance hearing is set for February 24, 2020 at 9:30am in Department 302. The settlement administrator shall file a final declaration one week in advance of the compliance hearing. Should a hearing be necessary, counsel may appear by court call.

Judgment and Final Approval of Settlement signed.
